this are 3 different datasets that i have created i have the csv files of these, now i want to use the kinesis service of aws to show the live streaming of the data in delay of 30 seconds , and also that these 3 files pass through only 1 kinesis i dont want to create 3 different .i want you to guide me completely of how to implement it step by step in complete detail
